sql.i: select rowguid,logindate,userinfo,outdate,usertoken,userguid from abs_logininfo where usertoken={usertoken} and outdate is null
update abs_logininfo set outdate=now() where usertoken={usertoken}

select rowguid,logindate,userinfo,outdate,usertoken,userguid from abs_logininfo where 1=1 <if test="userinfo != null and userinfo != ''"> and userinfo like concat('%',{userinfo},'%') </if> <if test="startDate != null"> and logindate >= {startDate} </if> <if test="endDate != null"> and logindate <= {endDate} </if> order by logindate desc limit {pageSize} offset {startIndex}

select count(1) from abs_logininfo where 1=1 <if test="userinfo != null and userinfo != ''"> and userinfo like concat('%',{userinfo},'%') </if> <if test="startDate != null"> and logindate >= {startDate} </if> <if test="endDate != null"> and logindate <= {endDate} </if>
